dataset.label: Customers have Primary Contact with eMail
dataset.name: Customers_have_Primary_Contact_with_eMail

dataset.label: C360 - MC - Always On - Onboarding new SafeZoneMobil kunde
dataset.name: C360_MC_Always_On_Onboarding_new_SafeZoneMobil_kunde

fields.formulaExpression:
case 
when (DRM_MARKET_PRODUCT_GROUP__c in('Bredbånd Bedrift Mobil','Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift','Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift IA','Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift IA + WAN','Trådløst Bredbånd Bedrift WAN' ) and
(contains(Product_Name__c,'B818')
or contains(Terminal__c , 'B818')))
then '0'
else '1'
end
fields.label: Can get SZ IA
fields.name: Can_get_SZ_IA

fields.formulaExpression:
case
when "SZMobillas.NBR_TBB_MOBIL__c" >= 1 and "SZMobillas.NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c" >= 1
then 'Fiber+TBB'
ELSE 
case
when "SZMobillas.NBR_TBB_MOBIL__c" >= 1 and "SZMobillas.NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c" < 1
Then 'TBB'
ELSE
case
when "SZMobillas.NBR_TBB_MOBIL__c" < 1 and "SZMobillas.NBR_FIXED_BBB_FIBER__c" >= 1
then 'Fiber'
ELSE '0'
end
end
end
fields.label: Personalization_5
fields.name: Personalization_5__c

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
Can_get_SZ_IA is not NULL then '1'
else
'0'
end
fields.label: Personalization_4
fields.name: Personalization_4__c

fields.formulaExpression:
case when
Location_Owner__c is not NULL then '1'
else
'0'
end
fields.label: Personalization 7
fields.name: Personalization_7__c
